hooks.command: bash -lc 'dir="$PWD"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$dir/.codex/hooks" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ ! -x "$dir/.codex/hooks/acm-session-context.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; exec "$dir/.codex/hooks/acm-session-context.sh"'

bash -lc 'dir="$PWD"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$dir/.codex/hooks" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ ! -x "$dir/.codex/hooks/acm-prompt-guard.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; exec "$dir/.codex/hooks/acm-prompt-guard.sh"'

bash -lc 'dir="$PWD"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$dir/.codex/hooks" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ ! -x "$dir/.codex/hooks/acm-stop-guard.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; exec "$dir/.codex/hooks/acm-stop-guard.sh"'
